title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ABB India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
